stemHtml:
Refer to figure or Chart E(LO)2 from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
Which route is the shortest from Pole Hill (POL) VOR (N53°45', W002°06') to Dean Cross (DCS) DME (N54°43', W003°20')?

options.a:
Route: POL - P17 - BARTN - L975 - WAL - N864 - DCS.
Distance: 126 NM
options.b:
Route: POL - Y70 - KOLID - L70 - GUNTU - N864 - DCS.
Distance: 108 NM
options.c:
Route: POL - N601- TLA - N864 - DCS.
Distance: 161 NM
options.d:
Route: POL - N57 - DCS.
Distance: 73 NM
